steps.title: Fastest path: try the choices
steps.content: Because the choices give possible solutions, plug them into the equation instead of solving from scratch. The only choice that satisfies the equation is B, $450$.

steps.title: Undo the addition
steps.content: The equation is $k+15=465$. Subtract $15$ from both sides: $$k=465-15.$$

steps.title: Check the choices
steps.content: The value $450$ is correct because $465-15=450$. Adding $15$ instead of subtracting, multiplying by $15$, or dividing by $15$ uses the wrong inverse operation. B is correct.
